item.title: Midori Takada, Eden Ahbez, 101 Strings Orchestra, Haruomi Hosono/Shigeru Suzuki/Tatsuro Yamashita, A.r.t. Wilson, Nelson Riddle and his Orchestra, The Mystic Moods Orchestra, Swing Slow (Miharu Koshi Harry Hosono Jr.), John Cameron, Michel Magne et son orchestre, Les Baxter – Exotica Lounge: 25 Tiki, Jungle, and Oriental Classics, Vol. 1
item.author: Midori Takada, Eden Ahbez, 101 Strings Orchestra, Haruomi Hosono/Shigeru Suzuki/Tatsuro Yamashita, A.r.t. Wilson, Nelson Riddle and his Orchestra, The Mystic Moods Orchestra, Swing Slow (Miharu Koshi Harry Hosono Jr.), John Cameron, Michel Magne et son orchestre, Les Baxter
